subcodes.first_line: O Divine Educator! These souls are engaged in prostration and earnestly supplicate the Kingdom of manifestation, therefore I beseech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مربی وجود این نفوس اهل سجودند و در نهایت تضرع به ملکوت شهود لهذا رجای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @God as immanent vs. transcendent reality, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness
